name: toughtongue
description: Skills and MCP server for the ToughTongue AI voice-agent platform — create scenarios, refine them from real transcripts, and analyze session performance.

interface.shortDescription: Create, refine, and analyze voice-agent practice scenarios
interface.longDescription: Gives your agent first-class access to ToughTongue AI — the voice-agent platform for interviews, sales, coaching, and negotiations. Bundles the hosted MCP server (scenarios, sessions, analytics, SIP calls, meeting bots) with three skills: scenario-creator builds production-ready scenarios from a brief or call transcript, scenario-refiner fixes live scenarios from real session evidence, and session-analyst turns session data into team performance reports.
defaultPrompt: Get me started with ToughTongue AI.
Create a ToughTongue scenario to practice handling pricing objections.
Pull the last 50 sessions for my discovery-call scenario and list the top 5 improvement areas.
The onboarding agent ends calls too early — pull low-scoring sessions and fix the scenario.
